name: linear-forge
description: Linear-driven development workflow — issue to merge in one command

linear_team_key.description: Linear team key prefix for issue identifiers (e.g., 'RES', 'ENG')

default_project.description: Default Linear project name to scope work to (optional)

branch_prefix.description: Git branch prefix (default: team key lowercase, e.g., 'res')

test_command.description: Command to run tests (e.g., 'npm test', 'go test ./...', 'cargo test')

lint_command.description: Command to run linter (e.g., 'npm run lint', 'golangci-lint run')

max_parallel_agents.description: Max concurrent subagents for parallel work (default: 5)

cleanup_commands.description: Commands to run after subagent work (e.g., 'find src -name CLAUDE.md -delete')
